_comment: Copy to mcp_servers.json (next to the neoethos-mcp binary, or pass --config PATH). Each server is connected on startup; the app's Supervisor/Codex sees their tools via GET /tools and invokes them via POST /call.

servers.name: ctrader
servers._note: cTrader official remote MCP (AI Agent Connect). Authenticates against cTrader Web on first use — a separate consent surface from the app's OAuth token; never share tokens across paths.

servers.name: filesystem
servers._note: Official filesystem MCP server, scoped to the given directory. Change '.' to the path you want the assistant to read/write.

servers.name: web
servers._note: Example web-search MCP (Brave). Requires the server's own API key in its environment. Swap for any web-search MCP server you prefer.

_more_servers_not_loaded._comment: Researched 2026-07-11 — move an entry into `servers` to enable it. SECURITY: pin the exact version you audited; in NeoEthos every trade-affecting MCP tool call still requires the operator's approval click — never grant a third-party server autonomous order flow.

mt5_full.name: mt5
mt5_full._note: MetaTrader 5 bridge (Windows + running MT5 terminal). Fullest alternative: github.com/MrBlackSheep91/mt5-mcp (28 tools incl. order execution — enables multi-account copy trading through Supervisor-approved actions); also github.com/ariadng/metatrader-mcp-server. Chart screenshots for LLM setup analysis: github.com/ali-rajabpour/metatrader-mcp.

tradingview_screener.name: tradingview
tradingview_screener._note: TradingView screeners + 30 TA tools (github.com/atilaahmettaner/tradingview-mcp) — pair/timeframe scanning for setup selection. Read-only market data.

sentiment_backtest.name: maverick
sentiment_backtest._note: VectorBT backtesting + reddit/x/news sentiment (github.com/wshobson/maverick-mcp) — a second opinion for the Supervisor before risk changes.
